benefits.description: Appetite suppression and skin tingles as markers of compound quality

side_effects.description: Received underdosed vial (20mg vial appeared to contain less compound) from vendor - no appetite suppression or skin tingles for 1 month

protocol_notes: Reports receiving potentially underdosed Retatrutide vial from vendor (20mg vial). Experienced loss of appetite suppression and skin tingling effects for 1 month before switching to next vial from same vendor/batch. Recommends 12-week cutting cycles followed by 8-12 week maintenance breaks to prevent metabolic adaptation.
